task: I need to let my supervisor know I’ll be missing part of a shift and want to send a quick note before things get busy. Can you help me word it clearly so it covers the basics and is easy to send?

turns.agent_response:
Yes — keep it short, clear, and direct.

## Text version
**“Hey [Name], I wanted to let you know I’ll be missing part of my shift on [day/time]. I’m letting you know as early as I can so you can plan coverage. Sorry for the inconvenience.”**

## Slightly more detailed
**“Hi [Name], I need to miss part of my shift on [day/time]. I wanted to give you notice as early as possible so coverage can be arranged. Let me know if you need anything else from me.”**

## Tiny memory version
**Say when, say why briefly, say you’re giving notice early.**

If you want, I can make it:
- **more casual**
- **more professional**
- **more apologetic**

user_simulator.text: Yeah, that works. Short and clear. I’d probably use the first one, just swap in the day and time. Clean enough to send.
